violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the food/pet food aisles and the shelving in the beverage coolers have an accumulation of dust and food residue. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

The freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice build up. All condensation water and other liquid wastes must be drained into a drain to prevent possible contamination of foods. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional items were observed in the men's bathroom. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, items, and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
The ceiling tiles in the retail area is in poor repair (water damage/broken tiles). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
Various beverages were observed stored on the floor in the in retail and back stock area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the milk and beverage coolers have an accumulation of food residue, other debris, and/or biofilm. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2023

The floors under shelves throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The following physical facilities were observed in poor repair: 1.holes in the walls in the back storage near back door and bathroom area. 2.floors are missing tiles in the back storage and bathroom area. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2023
